productDisplayName: Converse Men Black CT Lace Color Hi Canvas Shoes
description: A pair of round-toed black canvas shoes with green accents, has a high-top styling and central lace-upsCanvas upper with stitched detail, overlay, metallic eyelet detail on the side on the midfoot, branding on the side on the backfoot and a reinforced heel collarSoft tongue with stitched detailCushioned footbed with branding on the heel, has comfort insole featureThick midsole with foxing on the forefoot and branding on the backfootTextured outsole with patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months for manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
